nasb.text: Pardon, I pray, the iniquity of this people according to the greatness of Your lovingkindness, just as You also have forgiven this people, from Egypt even until now.”

esv.text: Please pardon the iniquity of this people, according to the greatness of your steadfast love, just as you have forgiven this people, from Egypt until now.”

cnv.text: 求你照著你的大慈愛，饒恕這人民的罪孽，好像你從埃及直到現在，常赦免這人民一樣。”

ccb.text: 从他们离开埃及直到现在，你一直在饶恕他们，求你以伟大的慈爱再次赦免这些人的罪。”
